Arbeitsagentur The “ Arbeitsagentur ” (Bundesagentur für Arbeit) is the Federal Employment Agency in Germany. It is a government-operated organization responsible for various labor-related services and initiatives in the country. While not a primarily job-searching site, it does have an option for employees to look for vacancies and for employers to post available positions.
